reviews.comment:
Esperaba que tuviera tienda Full pero no había o estaba cerrada.
Los baños siempre limpios al mejor estilo del ACA.
Es una estación muy pequeña. Solo para cargar combustible y pasar al baño. No cargue nafta por lo que no puedo opinar sobre la atención.

(Translated by Google)
I was hoping for a Full convenience store, but it either wasn't there or it was closed.
The restrooms were always clean, in true ACA style.
It's a very small station. Just a place to fill up and use the restroom. I didn't fill up, so I can't comment on the service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqdjVhVUJREAE

reviews.comment:
Un poquito más barata la nafta que en Mar del Plata. Raro. Siempre estuvo más cara. Llené el tanque el domingo y pague con la app modo, tengo cuenta sueldo del banco ciudad de BS AS, pero no me reintegraron el 15% porque descubrí en la letra chica que esta estación no estaba adherida y TODAS las de Mar  del Plata si. Raro no? Tratándose de una ACA. No me e gusto tampoco que el playero (cero onda) me hiciera pagar con la app dentro del auto y que le sacara foto a mus transferencias desde la app. Pero contrariamente a los comentarios de acá, hice cola pero me atendieron bastante rápido dentro de todo. Buena para salir de paso pero no para llenar el tanque, al menos para mí, por lo que me pasó, me perdí 6.000$ de reintegro a abril de 2024.

(Translated by Google)
Gas is a little cheaper than in Mar del Plata. Strange. It's always been more expensive. I filled up on Sunday and paid with the Modo app. I have a salary account with Banco Ciudad in Buenos Aires, but they didn't refund me the 15% because I discovered in the fine print that this station wasn't affiliated, but ALL the ones in Mar del Plata were. Strange, right? Considering an ACA station. I also didn't like that the gas station attendant (not cool at all) made me pay with the app inside the car and took photos of my transfers from the app. But contrary to the comments here, I waited in line, but they served me pretty quickly all in all. It's good for getting around, but not for filling up the tank, at least for me. As it turned out, I missed out on a $6,000 refund by April 2024.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqOGFydEdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lentos haya 3  o 10 autos la gente con bidones cargan 10 litros de nafta sin hacer cola mientras los automovilistas hacen largas colas perdiendo el doble de tiempo y deberian tener un surtidor para pagos en efectivos, el personal es muy  respetuoso y amable  pero el servicio es malo y tedioso

(Translated by Google)
Very slow whether there are 3 or 10 cars. People with jerrycans fill up with 10 liters of gasoline without queuing, while motorists wait in long lines, wasting twice as much time. They should have a pump for cash payments. The staff is very respectful and friendly, but the service is bad and tedious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqOXJmRjJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, siempre muy muy lento. No mejora nunca, años y años sin mejorar el servicio. Se aprovechan porque es la única en la zona. No importa si es verano o invierno, si hay turistas o no, nunca atienden eficientemente, siempre hay que hacer colas con mucha espera.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, always incredibly slow. It never improves; years and years without any improvement. They take advantage of the fact that it's the only one in the area. It doesn't matter if it's summer or winter, if there are tourists or not, they never provide efficient service; there are always long lines and long waits.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqb3VHcjBRRRAB
